claim_bullets.bullet_text: Another basic building block is partial application (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.72-73).
When a function takes multiple arguments, we can apply the function to some of the arguments to get a function that represents part of our application (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.72-73).
The Underscore library provides a higher-order function called map that applies another function to each element of an array (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.72-73).

source_record_text: This chapter covers partial application, a fundamental concept in functional programming, and demonstrates its application with practical examples using the Underscore library and custom implementations.
